nodes.name: Gmail Trigger
nodes.notes: Trigger: watches Gmail label 'InvoiceIngest' for emails with CSV attachments. Configure label in Gmail and point OAuth2 credentials here.

nodes.name: Google Drive Trigger (Bonus)
nodes.notes: BONUS: Second source — watches a Google Drive folder for new CSV uploads. Enable by un-disabling this node and disabling the Gmail Trigger.

nodes.name: Webhook Upload (Bonus)
nodes.notes: BONUS: Third source — multipart POST endpoint. Send CSV as form-data field 'file'. Enable for manual/API-driven uploads.

nodes.name: Extract CSV Attachment
nodes.notes: Normalises the binary payload from any trigger source into a single { binary.data, json.source_file_name } shape. Filters to .csv files only.

nodes.name: Compute SHA-256 Hash
nodes.notes: Computes SHA-256 of the raw CSV bytes. Stored as source_hash. Can be used to guard against reprocessing identical files.

nodes.name: Parse CSV → JSON Rows
nodes.notes: Converts the CSV binary into individual JSON items — one per row. Headers auto-detected. Each output item = one invoice row.

nodes.name: Attach File Metadata to Rows
nodes.notes: Re-attaches source_file_name and source_hash to every parsed row (the CSV parser outputs clean rows without the binary context).

nodes.name: Validate & Normalise Rows
nodes.notes: Core validation engine. R1=required fields, R2=math check, R3=VAT 15% default, R4=future date. Set DRY_RUN=true at top to use staging table. Attaches execution_id and row_number for traceability.

nodes.name: Split Valid / Invalid
nodes.notes: Routes: TRUE branch → dedup check → insert. FALSE branch → mark failed, collect for email summary.

nodes.name: Dedup Check (DB Query)
nodes.notes: Checks if (supplier_number, invoice_number) already exists. Returns 1 row if duplicate, 0 rows if new. Uses parameterised-style query — update to use $1/$2 params if your n8n version supports it.

nodes.name: Evaluate Dedup Result
nodes.notes: Interprets the Postgres query result. If a row was returned, flags the invoice as a duplicate. Non-duplicates proceed to INSERT.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO {{ $json._dry_run ? 'supplier_invoices_staging' : 'supplier_invoices' }} (
  invoice_number, supplier_number, supplier_name, department,
  amount_excl_vat, vat, amount_incl_vat, invoice_date,
  source_file_name, source_hash, status, validation_notes,
  execution_id, row_number
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.invoice_number }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_number }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_name }}',
  '{{ $json.department }}',
  {{ $json.amount_excl_vat }},
  {{ $json.vat }},
  {{ $json.amount_incl_vat }},
  '{{ $json.invoice_date }}',
  '{{ $json.source_file_name }}',
  '{{ $json.source_hash }}',
  'inserted',
  '{{ $json.validation_notes }}',
  '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
  {{ $json.row_number }}
)
ON CONFLICT (supplier_number, invoice_number) DO NOTHING
RETURNING *;

nodes.name: Insert to DB (supplier_invoices)
nodes.notes: Inserts valid, non-duplicate rows. Supports DRY_RUN flag — set to true in Validate node to write to supplier_invoices_staging instead. Includes execution_id and row_number for traceability.

nodes.name: Mark as Duplicate
nodes.notes: Tags duplicate rows with status='duplicate' and a clear reason. Feeds into the metrics aggregator.

nodes.name: Mark as Failed
nodes.notes: Tags invalid rows with status='failed'. validation_notes already populated by the Validate node.

nodes.name: Write to Failures Table (Bonus)
nodes.notes: BONUS: Persists failed rows to supplier_invoices_failures with retry_count=0. A separate retry workflow can query WHERE retry_count < 3 to re-attempt after manual correction.

nodes.name: Aggregate Metrics & Build Email
nodes.notes: Collects all branch outputs, counts processed/inserted/duplicates/failed, builds HTML email. Error table shows Row # for easy debugging. Execution ID in footer for traceability. Capped at 20 error rows.

nodes.name: Send Email Alert
nodes.notes: Sends HTML summary email. Update 'sendTo' to your team's email address. Alternatively swap this node for SMTP (n8n-nodes-base.emailSend) if not using Gmail.

nodes.name: Is Duplicate?
nodes.notes: TRUE = duplicate → skip insert, mark status='duplicate'. FALSE = new record → INSERT.

nodes.name: Download file
nodes.notes: Downloads the CSV file from Google Drive using the file ID from the trigger event.

nodes.name: File Already Processed?
nodes.notes: TRUE = file hash found in DB → send skip email, stop processing. FALSE = new file → continue to CSV parsing. Prevents wasted compute on duplicate uploads.

nodes.name: Build Skip Email
nodes.notes: Builds the skip notification email when a file has already been processed. Includes file name, hash, and execution ID for auditing.
